name: xmux
description: Codex and Claude hook harness integration for XMux.

interface.shortDescription: Operate the XMux Codex-Claude hook harness.
interface.longDescription: Adds the XMux skill and protocol assets for routing explicit Codex requests to Claude through pane-owned hook harnesses.
defaultPrompt: Use $xmux-claude for explicit Claude routing through XMux.
